# Even G2. The everyday display smart glasses.

![](data:image/jpeg;base64,)![](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/wfyhg2qw/production/7721dc66a74f9164adde5722b27d131a57981832-2800x2000.jpg?auto=format&fit=max&q=100&w=1400)![](data:image/jpeg;base64,)![](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/wfyhg2qw/production/f82baa8b93cfe6b99a6977a9753c8953e1986176-1800x2800.jpg?auto=format&fit=max&q=100&w=900)

## A floating display. Now with an extra dimension.

75% bigger, sharper than ever, with crisp text. No blur, no wobble, edge to edge. Crystal clear to you, invisible to everyone else. Instant notifications appear closer and take priority, while ongoing content waits quietly in the background - so you can focus on what matters, the moment it matters.

## Introducing Conversate. We’re talking contextual AI.

Conversate uses contextual AI to follow what’s being said and cues useful suggestions for a more meaningful exchange. So you can lead every conversation with confidence, stay sharp and make better decisions – without asking or anyone noticing.

Conversate uses contextual AI to follow what’s being said and cues useful suggestions for a more meaningful exchange. So you can lead every conversation with confidence, stay sharp and make better decisions – without asking or anyone noticing.

Conversate uses contextual AI to follow what’s being said and cues useful suggestions for a more meaningful exchange. So you can lead every conversation with confidence, stay sharp and make better decisions – without asking or anyone noticing.

Concepts

Bios

Answers

Suggestions

Transcripts

AI summaries

## Seeing is achieving.

Dynamic tools unleash your true potential.

In time with the speed you deliver your talk, your words scroll in front of you. Or you can scroll with Even R1. While you maintain eye contact with your audience.

Say "Hey, Even" and Even G2 listens, thinks and shows you the answer - from quick questions to controlling every feature. Even AI remembers previous prompts, so every interaction picks up right where you left off.

Translate lets you see real-time subtitles in your own language when you have a conversation - so you can follow every word, in 31 languages.

Clear, precise directions overlay your real world street view. Accurate prompts and no fumbling with phones. So you can confidently find your way, all over the world.

Dashboard puts your day at a glance - with smart, customisable widgets for everything from health to headlines.

Keeps you effortlessly in the loop. Every update you select to be notified about pops up, right in front of your eyes.

Just speak and a to-do list appears with due dates for each item. When you’ve completed a task, just touch Even G2 or Even R1 - to cross it off the list.

Conversate uses contextual AI to explain terminology, show public bios, provide on-the-spot answers, suggest follow-up questions, generate subtitles and capture meeting summaries. So you'll never feel out of the loop. And you'll be able to actively lead any conversation.

## Amazing interaction. Via a unique wearable.

Even R1 is a discreet, intuitive and powerful smart ring that interacts with Even G2. Tap, scroll, control. Simple as that. Plus, it doubles as a wellness coach by continuously monitoring your vital signs.

[Explore now](/smart-ring)

![](data:image/jpeg;base64,)![](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/wfyhg2qw/production/54cd781e42cf1ec32e83649552d37b30dfbd25f6-1888x936.jpg?auto=format&fit=max&q=100&w=944)![](data:image/jpeg;base64,)![](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/wfyhg2qw/production/ba1e6539985b6386cc01463cbd00dec656bdb7ed-1984x1362.jpg?auto=format&fit=max&q=100&w=992)

## Classic styles, reconfigured.

[Virtual try on](https://d3lgac2qoojxa5.cloudfront.net/build/try-on-ui-even-g2.html?variant=10595)

## Optical precision. Brilliant display.

### Seamless display integration and clarity.

Our high-precision, multi-layer lenses out-perform traditional premium ones. They deliver both superior pass-through vision and peripheral vision. And yet they are 30% thinner than before. They work in concert with a display lens layer, which shows you content with virtually no loss of clarity.

[Learn more](/tech#lens)

## True to your prescription.

Each lens is digitally etched, faithfully following the precise data of your prescription. No two lenses are alike, even in a pair. Each one is tailored specifically for you. No-one else.

[Learn more](/tech)

## Slimmer, lighter, yet just as stable.

![](data:image/png;base64,)![](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/wfyhg2qw/production/3dbe6f7d808fc341c6bce320a3237bbdb4130dd3-1888x936.png?auto=format&fit=max&q=100&w=944)![](data:image/jpeg;base64,)![](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/wfyhg2qw/production/6021b36795d26e72a1ffbe1443f4ac64b85c2526-722x1480.jpg?auto=format&fit=max&q=100&w=361)

## Aerospace grade metals have landed.

Even G2 has full titanium temples. And magnesium frames. The kind of strength and durability insisted on by aircraft designers is now available on the ground.

[Explore Now](/tech)

![](data:image/jpeg;base64,)![](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/wfyhg2qw/production/7455af09786e61f3583053094863a7b95b761e57-3744x3744.jpg?auto=format&fit=max&q=100&w=1872)![](data:image/jpeg;base64,)![](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/wfyhg2qw/production/0ae245141458dca2863b4a61fc5945cb9a04a110-936x936.jpg?auto=format&fit=max&q=100&w=468)

## Water or dust? Denied.

Even G2 passed the toughest test, IP67 certification, indicating a high level of protection.

![](data:image/jpeg;base64,)![](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/wfyhg2qw/production/d1c99d352a34e1d51d8327fd904aba4218fecb66-3744x3744.jpg?auto=format&fit=max&q=100&w=1872)![](data:image/jpeg;base64,)![](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/wfyhg2qw/production/1a4ac2498c08cc2d56ada07841b268e5ab1f2db2-1872x1872.jpg?auto=format&fit=max&q=100&w=936)

## 2-day battery life? Your phone is jealous.

Even G2 can go for over days. And the charging case holds enough power for seven full charges.

![](data:image/jpeg;base64,)![](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/wfyhg2qw/production/16665d242f08e35f312d747e35140d7057417770-2832x1404.jpg?auto=format&fit=max&q=100&w=1416)![](data:image/jpeg;base64,)![](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/wfyhg2qw/production/96bfd20a5798810712083a0ebdd7565e547bab91-1984x1400.jpg?auto=format&fit=max&q=100&w=992)

## The Even Hub. Coming soon.

Here, developers can create powerful new tools, powered by Even OS. While wearers can explore a growing library of plug-ins that unlock more ways to see, do and experience the world around them.

Companion app

## Your privacy is precious.

Your privacy matters to Even Realities. You’re in control of your data - always. No data is stored in the cloud without your explicit consent. And when processing is needed, data is always encrypted with sensitive personal information removed.

## FAQs.

If you have any further questions, please visit the Even Support Center.

[Support](/contact)

Lens & display

### Does Even G2 support prescription lenses, and which types?

Yes, Even G2 is available as prescription smart glasses, supporting a wide range from -12.00 to +12.00. We support single-vision lenses for myopia, hyperopia, and astigmatism. While progressive lenses are not available online, you can order them through our authorized retail partners. Simply select single-vision and upload your prescription when ordering online.

### Can I update my lenses if my prescription changes?

Absolutely. There's no need to replace your frame; just send your new prescription to our support team. We're here to assist you with a seamless custom lens replacement.

### How does the display perform in various lighting, and will it cause eye strain?

Even G2 features brightness sensors that automatically adjust the display for clear vision in any setting, from bright sunshine to dimly lit environments. Prolonged use is very unlikely to cause eye strain or discomfort because the display only illuminates the necessary pixels, keeping the background unlit for very low light intensity. Notifications are projected approximately 2 meters in front of you, preventing the ciliary muscle fatigue associated with close-range viewing.

### How do I choose the right lens thickness for my prescription?

Choosing the right high-index lenses depends on your prescription strength. Here's a quick guide to help you find the perfect balance of clarity and comfort. - Essential Slim (Index 1.60) For light to moderate prescriptions (from +2.00 to -3.00). Clearer, lighter and thinner than standard lenses, making it a great choice for most wearers. - Enhanced Slim (Index 1.67) Ideal for moderate to strong prescriptions (from +4.00 to -6.00). These lenses are significantly thinner and lighter than the 1.60 index, which reduces edge thickness and lens bulge for everyday comfort. - Superior Slim (Index 1.74) Our thinnest and clearest lens, best for strong prescriptions (above +12.00 or lower than -12.00). It minimizes the "bottle-bottom" effect, providing a sleek appearance and superior visual clarity.

Design & functionality

### What makes Even G2 unique among smart glasses?

Even G2 are smart glasses with a display that look like regular glasses. Powered by AI, they provide a range of features, from real-time translation and a teleprompter to health monitoring and proactive AI prompts. Thanks to advanced digitally surfaced lenses, they are also your best prescription glasses, even without their smart features.

### Does Even G2 have AI capabilities?

Yes, Even G2 smart glasses integrate prowerful AI models like ChatGPT, Perplexity... and proprietary Even LLM for voice commands, real-time translation, smart notifications, and contextual information delivery.

### Does Even G2 have a camera?

To prioritize your privacy and deliver a seamless display experience, Even G2 relies on its integrated microphone for information input rather than a camera.

### How does the Even R1 give me control over my phone and glasses?

Even R1 connects to your phone via Bluetooth, pairing with Even G2 through the app to give you discreet control without ever needing to touch your glasses or smartphone.

Usage & care

### Is Even G2 water-resistant?

Yes, the Even G2 smart glasses are rated IP67 water-resistant. This means they are fully protected from dust and can withstand being submerged in water for up to 30 minutes. This high level of durability makes them perfect for workouts, unexpected rain, or accidental splashes, so you can wear them worry-free every day.

### How should I clean my Even G2 glasses?

Gently wipe the lenses and frame with a soft, dry, non-alcoholic cloth. Avoid using water or ultrasonic cleaners.

Battery & charging

### How long does the battery of Even G2 last on a single charge?

The built-in lithium battery of Even G2 lasts up to 2 days on a single charge, depending on usage.

### How long does it take to fully charge the battery of Even G2 ?

It typically takes 1-1.5 hours to fully charge the glasses. The included charging case provides up to 7 full charges, ensuring extended use without needing a power outlet.

Warranty & exchange

### Can I return my Even G2 ?

Non-prescription glasses are eligible for returns within 14 days of receipt. As prescription glasses are custom-crafted, cancellations are only possible within 24 hours of purchase. Please consult our full Return Policy for complete details.

### Does Even G2 come with a warranty?

Yes, Even G2 includes a 2-year warranty for Europe and a 1-year warranty for all other regions and countries. Refer to our Warranty Policy for detailed terms and conditions.
